content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course following the left-hand curve smoothly.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 37 + 5 = 42
Waypoint 42: (6.3805, 2.7597)
Car position: (6.8288, 2.2060)
Bearing = atan2(2.7597 - 2.2060, 6.3805 - 6.8288) = atan2(0.5537, -0.4483)
= 180 - atan2(0.5537, 0.4483) = 180 - 51.0° = 129.0° (second quadrant)
Current heading: 117.17°
Delta = 129.0 - 117.17 = 11.83° → left
